guide:
# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** Asogwe Greth  
Asogwe Greth sends you to Merchant Filgo to get a Muddy Robe. Head south to the base of the ramp to find Merchant Filgo. Return to Asogwe Greth.

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** Asogwe Greth  
1. Talk to Asogwe Greth; she sends you to Spiritmaster Korg. Find the ramp to the south that leads up and upon reaching the top head west out of this area and proceed till you come to the next open area. From here, you should be able to con Spiritmaster Korg directly in front of you.  
2. Spiritmaster Korg sends you to Coachman Dilga. There is an opening to the southwest from Korg. Head through this opening and continue west through a structure with walls and merchants. On the other side is another huge stone doorway. Go there and stop. You should be able to con Coachman Dilga on your left.  
3. Return to Asogwe Greth.

---

# Level 3

**Quest NPC:** Asogwe Greth  
Talk to Asogwe Greth; he sends you to kill Centipedes in the area where a guard is running around killing them. You need two slivers of Centipede Meat. Kill, loot, return to Asogwe Greth.

---

# Level 4

**Quest NPC:** Asogwe Greth  
1. Talk to Asogwe Greth.  
2. Buy two items from Merchant Orf: a stripe of leather and a piece of iron ore.  
3. You need a 'Chipped' Raven Beak. Go out the North Gate and kill birds until you get the drop.  
4. Return to Asogwe Greth.

---

# Level 5

**Quest NPC:** Asogwe Greth  
Talk to Asogwe Greth; he sends you to kill a Lizardman Outcast (CONs yellow to red) at an abandoned tower to the southwest. Head out the South Gate and go west. Kill, loot scale, return to Asogwe Greth.

---

# Level 7

**Quest NPC:** Si Pwen Noora  
1. Talk to Si Pwen Noora in the room with a pit full of centipedes. She sends you to a guard named Fraug at the outpost near Moggok's Gate. Head out the South Gate, follow the road to Moggok's Gate.  
2. Fraug says Lork was buried by the catapult on the opposite side of the building. Approaching the catapult will spawn Lork.  
3. Talk to Lork; he sends you to find a Craknek camp. Head east along the road for a Craknek camp on the north side near Moggok's Gate. Find a shallow grave, break fingers, return to Lork.  
4. Lork tells you the name of the one who killed him: Gred the Boko. Return to Si Pwen Noora.  
5. Si Pwen Noora rewards you.

---

# Level 10

**Quest NPC:** Si Pwen Noora  
After reaching level 10 and speaking with Si Pwen Noora, you are told to magically travel to Neriak via the Shimmering Portal and speak with Pazin J'Esal. The portal's location is found by going to Coachman Dilga, head west through the huge stone doorway, then south through the next huge stone doorway; stop when you see a large boulder. The portal is hidden behind it and is con-able.  
Speak to the portal to travel magically to Neriak. Once in Neriak, head south to the Blind Fish Tavern and speak with Pazin J'Esal.  
Pazin is angry over dealings with a human necromancer named Korpus. You must travel to Freeport to deal with him. Sign the coachman's ledger, follow the road to the river, run or swim south along the river to the ocean just north of Freeport. Find the north gate, enter Freeport, and a pop-up will alert you to Korpus's location. Buy an anointed sapphire from Merchant Gilgash near the docks (250 tunar). Head east along the shoreline, find and kill Korpus. The sapphire changes to a charred sapphire. Return to Oggok and give the charred sapphire to Si Pwen Noora.  
Reward: **556,753 XP** and the **Charred Sapphire Staff**.

---

# Level 13

**Quest NPC:** Si Pwen Noora  
Upon reaching level 13, Noora tasks you to gather materials for a special pouch to carry the deadly seeing stone.  
Item 1: Lizardman Sneak Hide – head out the South Gate of Oggok, travel along the south shoreline of the lake, kill Lizardman Sneak, loot hide, return to Noora.  
Item 2: Basilisk Gut – purchase from Merchant Filgo in main area, return to Noora.  
After receiving the pouch, retrieve the seeing stone on a small island south of the gate. Travel south along the road to a guard tower, leave the road, head west to the island. Place your hand in the head stone and pull out the seeing stone. Roaches will spawn; defeat them using abilities and healing. Return the seeing stone to Noora in the pouch.  
Reward: **550,698 XP** and the **Ward Death** ability.

---

# Level 15

**Quest NPC:** Si Pwen Noora  
Buy an anointed ruby from Merchant Filgo and bring it back. Travel to Neriak via the Shimmering Portal and kill Bouncer Frada (cons yellow) near the river. Report back to Noora.  
Obtain oil from the Necrapede south of Oggok.  
Annoint Frada's remains and bury them on the island topped with mushrooms. Report back to Noora.  
Unearth the remains, shatter the anointed ruby, observe results, and report to Noora.

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Asogwe Greth  
1. Talk to Asogwe Greth; he sends you in search of an old ogre named Argra in Honjur.  
2. Coach to Honjur, talk to Grugnik Blackface north of the coach in a building with a banker. He sends you to get four Triad Stones from Druid and Ranger Trainees (CONS LB to DB). Go out the western gate, head NW to a hill with an outpost. Kill trainees until you have 4 stones, return to Grugnik.  
3. Grugnik sends you to Wyndhaven to kill Dertax Redgrin (CONS yellow). Coach to Wyndhaven; Dertax walks the road from the inn to the little keep south along the road. Kill, loot, return to Grugnik.  
4. Grugnik needs 525 tunar.  
5. Grugnik tells you Argra is the big bear (Gertrude) in Bear Cave (SW) on the side of a mountain.  
6. Talk to the bear, then return to Asogwe Greth.  
7. Asogwe Greth rewards you with **2.81 million XP**. Reward choices: Dagger with the Life Path or Staff with the Power Path.
